name: pantheon-ai/k8s-toolkit
summary: Comprehensive Kubernetes toolkit for YAML generation, validation, and cluster debugging

k8s-yaml-generator.summary: Generate production-ready Kubernetes YAML manifests with best practices and CRD support

k8s-yaml-validator.summary: Validate, lint, and test Kubernetes YAML resources with comprehensive error reporting

k8s-debug.summary: Debug Kubernetes clusters, pods, services, and network connectivity issues
